## tscli get logs aws

Get AWS external ID for log streaming

### Synopsis

Get or create an AWS external ID for use in IAM role trust policies.
This external ID is required when setting up AWS log streaming integration.

```
tscli get logs aws [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for aws
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -k, --api-key string   Tailscale API key
  -d, --debug            Dump HTTP requests/responses
  -o, --output string    Output: [json yaml human pretty]
  -n, --tailnet string   Tailscale tailnet (default "-")
```

### SEE ALSO

* [tscli get logs](tscli_get_logs.md)	 - Get logs for the tailnet
* [tscli get logs aws validate](tscli_get_logs_aws_validate.md)	 - Validate AWS trust policy for log streaming
